title: Shrek
body:
[![Shrek Header Banner](http://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shrek/BH_S_header.webp)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net/)

[![BisectHosting Promotional Banner](http://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shrek/BH_S_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)

![About Banner](http://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shrek/BH_S_banner.webp)

This mod adds your favourite Ogre, Shrek, to Minecraft! Explore the swamp biomes for a chance to come across Shrek's house, where you will find him, and perhaps some friends of his, minding their own business. Careful not to angry the brute, as Ogres can prove to be quite violent!

Kingdom of Far Far Away coming in the future...
